content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Diverse Substring". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1073/A
constraints: s contains only lowercase English letters from 'a' to 'z'
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n. The second line contains a string s of length n.
content.outputFormat: Print the length of the shortest substring of s that contains all the characters from 'a' to 'd' at least once.
